articles.title: Alex Cora calls Terry Francona a ‘Hall of Fame manager’
articles.description:
“I feel fortunate to have been around so many good people because they’ve helped me get better," Francona said of Cora.

The post Alex Cora calls Terry Francona a ‘Hall of Fame manager’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Alex Cora praised Terry Francona as a Hall of Fame manager during a recent interview.
Francona expressed gratitude for the influence of good people like Cora on his career.
This recognition highlights the strong mentorship culture within Boston's baseball community.

articles.title: Victim tied up by armed intruder during Beverly home invasion, police say
articles.description:
The victim was treated and released at a local hospital.

The post Victim tied up by armed intruder during Beverly home invasion, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Victim was tied up by an armed intruder during a Beverly home invasion.
The victim received treatment and was released from a local hospital.
Residents in Beverly are urged to enhance home security following this incident.

articles.title: After ‘No Kings’ rally, local organizers are looking to sustain momentum. What’s next?
articles.description:
The coalition behind “No Kings” rallies in Boston urge weekly action and plans for May Day mobilization.

The post After ‘No Kings’ rally, local organizers are looking to sustain momentum. What’s next? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Local organizers from the 'No Kings' coalition plan weekly actions for community engagement.
They are preparing for a significant mobilization event on May Day, May 1, 2026.
These efforts aim to sustain community momentum and address local social issues.
